Package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Class UseOperationContractRule

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.UseOperationContractRule
All Implemented Interfaces:
BuiltInRule, Rule, HasOrigin
public final class UseOperationContractRule extends Object implements BuiltInRule
Implements the rule which inserts operation contracts for a method call.

  • Method Details

    • getApplicableContracts

      public static ImmutableSet<FunctionalOperationContract> getApplicableContracts(UseOperationContractRule.Instantiation inst, Services services)
      Returns the operation contracts which are applicable for the passed instantiation.
      Parameters:
      inst - the operation contract rule instantiation
      services - the services object
      Returns:
      all applicable contracts

    • replaceStatement

      public static StatementBlock replaceStatement(JavaBlock jb, StatementBlock replacement)

    • computeInstantiation

      public static UseOperationContractRule.Instantiation computeInstantiation(Term focusTerm, Services services)
      Computes instantiation for contract rule on passed focus term. Internally only serves as helper for instantiate().

    • isApplicable

      public boolean isApplicable(Goal goal, PosInOccurrence pio)
      Description copied from interface: BuiltInRule
      returns true iff a rule is applicable at the given position. This does not necessarily mean that a rule application will change the goal (this decision is made due to performance reasons)
      Specified by:
      isApplicable in interface BuiltInRule

    • apply

      public @NonNull ImmutableList<Goal> apply(Goal goal, Services services, RuleApp ruleApp)
      Description copied from interface: Rule
      the rule is applied on the given goal using the information of rule application.
      Specified by:
      apply in interface Rule
      Parameters:
      goal - the Goal on which to apply ruleApp
      services - the Services with the necessary information about the java programs
      ruleApp - the rule application to be executed
      Returns:
      all open goals below \old(goal.node()), i.e. the goals resulting from the rule application

    • name

      public Name name()
      Description copied from interface: Rule
      the name of the rule
      Specified by:
      name in interface Rule

    • computeAtPreVars

      public static Map<LocationVariable,LocationVariable> computeAtPreVars(List<LocationVariable> heapContext, TermServices services, UseOperationContractRule.Instantiation inst)
      Returns the correct pre-heap variables.
      Parameters:
      heapContext - the heap variables
      services - the services object
      inst - the instantiation for the operation contract rule
      Returns:
      a list of the resulting pre-heap variables

    • computeSelf

      public static Term computeSelf(Term baseHeapTerm, Map<LocationVariable,Term> atPres, LocationVariable baseHeap, UseOperationContractRule.Instantiation inst, Term resultTerm, TermFactory tf)
      Returns the correct self term.
      Parameters:
      baseHeapTerm - the heap term
      atPres - the pre-heap variables as terms
      baseHeap - the heap variable
      inst - the instantiation for the operation contract rule
      resultTerm - the term of the result variable
      tf - the term factory
      Returns:
      the resulting self term

    • computeParams

      public static ImmutableList<Term> computeParams(Term baseHeapTerm, Map<LocationVariable,Term> atPres, LocationVariable baseHeap, UseOperationContractRule.Instantiation inst, TermFactory tf)
      Returns the correct parameter terms.
      Parameters:
      baseHeapTerm - the heap term
      atPres - the pre-heap variables as terms
      baseHeap - the heap variable
      inst - the instantiation for the operation contract rule
      tf - the term factory
      Returns:
      a list of the resulting parameter terms
